hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in */uv.lock|uv.lock|*/.streamlit/secrets.toml|.streamlit/secrets.toml) echo "Blocked: $f is protected — uv.lock changes only via uv; secrets.toml must never be edited here." >&2; exit 2;; esac; exit 0
cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && uv run ruff check --fix . && uv run ruff format .
cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && uv run ty check && uv run pytest test_streamlit_app.py test_streamlit_ui.py -q
